title: heliopsis helianthoides var. minor
intro: Heliopsis helianthoides var. minor, also known as the false sunflower or prairie false sunflower, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Heliopsis helianthoides var. minor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine.
